name: Crockpot Swedish Style Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the steak into serving-size pieces.
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
3. Place in a crock-pot.
4. Add dill, onion, bouillon cube, and 3/8 cup water to the pot.
5. Cover and cook on low for 6 to 8 hours.
6. Remove the meat from the pot.
7. Thicken the juices with flour dissolved in 1/4 cup cold water.
8. Turn the control to high; cook for 10 minutes or until slightly thickened.
9. Stir in sour cream.
10. Turn off the heat. Serve sauce over the meat, with mashed potatoes or noodles.
